about.title: About me
about.description: As a frontend developer, I enjoy transforming ideas into interactive and visually appealing web applications. My passion for clean code and user-friendly interfaces drives me to constantly explore new technologies and best practices.
about.ctaText: Let's connect and create something amazing together!
about.feature1: Based in Germany, I am flexible with remote work and open to relocation opportunities for the right project.
about.feature2: I am passionate about learning new technologies and continuously improving my skills to stay ahead in the ever-evolving tech landscape.
about.feature3: I approach each challenge with analytical thinking and creativity, always striving to find efficient and elegant solutions through collaboration.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description:
I have gained experience working on various projects using technologies like HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, and Angular. I am always eager to learn new tools and adapt to emerging technologies.

Continuous learning is key in web development, and I stay up-to-date with the latest trends and best practices.
skills.anotherSkillText: Feel free to contact me. I am open to learning new technologies and frameworks to meet your project needs.
skills.learningModalTitle: I have a special interest in learning

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Explore a selection of my work here – interact with projects to see my skills in action.
portfolio.pokedexDesc: A Pokemon encyclopedia that fetches data from the PokeAPI. Browse, search and explore detailed information about different Pokemon.
portfolio.polloDesc: Jump, run and throw game based on object-oriented approach. Help Pepe to find coins and tabasco salsa to fight against the crazy hen.
portfolio.dabubbleDesc: This App is a Slack Clone App. It revolutionizes team communication and collaboration with its intuitive interface, real-time messaging, and all the features.
portfolio.joinDesc: A modern event planning platform that simplifies building meetups and managing participants.

testimonials.quote1: I had the pleasure of working with Vadim on frontend projects at the Developer Akademie. He is extremely hardworking, fast, and always willing to take on additional tasks when needed. His helpful attitude and strong work ethic made collaboration smooth and reliable.
testimonials.quote2: Vadim is a hardworking, detail-oriented, and responsible team member. He consistently completed his tasks on time and was able to react quickly when needed, which helped keep the team’s workflow smooth. Technically, he is strong and pays attention to writing clean and well-structured code.
testimonials.quote3: Vadim is a reliable developer who brings creative solutions to complex problems. His frontend skills and team spirit make him a valuable asset.

contact.title: Contact
contact.infoText: Encourage people to contact you and describe what role you see yourself in. Show that you will add value to their projects through your work.
contact.privacyLabel: I've read the privacy policy and agree to the processing of my data as outlined.

legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.acceptanceText: By accessing and using this Portfolio, you acknowledge and agree to the following terms and conditions, and any policies, guidelines, or amendments thereto that may be presented to you from time to time.
legal.scopeHeading: Scope and ownership of the product
legal.scopeText1: This Portfolio has been developed as part of a web development project at the Developer Akademie GmbH. It has an educational purpose and is not intended for extensive personal & business usage.
legal.scopeText2: The design of this Portfolio is owned by the Developer Akademie GmbH. Unauthorized use, reproduction, modification, distribution, or replication of the design is strictly prohibited.
legal.proprietaryText: Aside from the design owned by Developer Akademie GmbH, I retain all proprietary rights in this Portfolio, including any associated copyrighted material, trademarks, and other proprietary information.
legal.useText: This Portfolio is intended to be used for lawful purposes only, in accordance with all applicable laws and regulations. Any use for illegal activities is strictly prohibited.
legal.disclaimerHeading: Disclaimer of warranties and limitation of liability
legal.disclaimerText: This Portfolio is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind, express or implied, including but not limited to the implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.
legal.indemnityText: You agree to indemnify, defend and hold harmless the owner of this Portfolio from and against any claim, demand, loss, damage, cost, or liability arising out of or relating to your use of this Portfolio.
legal.questionsText: For any questions or notices, please contact me at info@vadimcebanu.dev
